hero.title: Infrastructure-grade software for operational environments.
hero.subtitle: We architect systems for organizations where failure has consequences.
hero.body: Custom development, automation engineering, and security hardening for regulated and mission-critical operations.

engagement.title: Request an Architecture Review.
engagement.p1: This is a qualification gate — not a generic contact form. We’ll review your context, identify risk areas, and reply with a recommended next step.
engagement.p2: Expected response window: 24–48 hours. If your request is time-sensitive, specify it in the submission.

form.orgPlaceholder: e.g., Municipality / Public authority / Private enterprise
form.emailHint: Personal email is accepted (soft filter), but organizational email gets prioritized.
form.needOrgEmail: Provide an organization and a valid email to continue.
form.summaryPlaceholder: What environment is this for? Current stack? Constraints? Risks? What does success look like?
form.summaryHint: We respond faster to concrete constraints, scope, and risk signals.
form.receivedBody: Your request is in the queue. If additional details are required, we’ll reply to your email.
form.completeForm: Please complete the form. Summary must be at least {min} characters.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We collect only what is necessary to respond to your request and keep the site reliable.

dataWeCollect.title: What we collect
dataWeCollect.body: Form data (organization, email, budget, timeline, summary) and minimal technical data (e.g., IP for abuse prevention).

howWeUse.title: How we use data
howWeUse.body: To evaluate your request, reply by email, and prevent spam/abuse.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: We retain data only as needed for communication and follow-up, then delete or anonymize it.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell data or share it for marketing. We may use technical providers strictly for email delivery/hosting.

security.title: Security
security.body: We apply reasonable safeguards (abuse limiting, minimal logging, data minimization).

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy questions, use the contact form or the public address listed on the site.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using this site you agree to the terms below.

scope.title: Scope
scope.body: Content is informational. Any engagement is defined by a separate contract.

noWarranty.title: No implied warranties
noWarranty.body: The site is provided “as is”. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or error-free operation.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: We are not liable for indirect losses arising from use of information on this site.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.body: Abusing the form, spamming, or attempting to compromise security is prohibited.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms periodically. The current version is published on this page.
